name: Best: Chocolate Mocha Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the recipe.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, cream the sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the sugar mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture into the prepared pan and bake for the specified time.
6. Turn off the oven and let it cool completely before removing the cake from the pan.
